text.message: If u don’t rob me black you’ll win
He’s been testing my name last 10 games
And I’ve made sure he loses
But I think he likes losing
Nah black wants to battle me again
He hit me first 10 game in a row
Just play, man. You ruin all of our game by griefing
He start every game he knows how it goes
If black gets me ill get him
Lowkey don’t sleep on oj pls
Wait I should hit oj now
